static Pass * createPass (AnalysisID ID)

Detailed Description

FunctionPass class - This class is used to implement most global optimizations. Optimizations should subclass this class if they meet the following constraints:

  1. Optimizations are organized globally, i.e., a function at a time
  2. Optimizing a function does not cause the addition or removal of any functions in the module

Definition at line 294 of file Pass.h.

◆ runOnFunction()

virtual bool llvm::FunctionPass::runOnFunction ( Function & F)
pure virtual

runOnFunction - Virtual method overriden by subclasses to do the per-function processing of the pass.

Implemented in llvm::BlockFrequencyInfo, llvm::BranchProbabilityInfo, llvm::DependenceAnalysis, llvm::DominanceFrontier, llvm::DominatorTreeWrapperPass, llvm::DOTGraphTraitsPrinter< AnalysisT, IsSimple, GraphT, AnalysisGraphTraitsT >, llvm::DOTGraphTraitsViewer< AnalysisT, IsSimple, GraphT, AnalysisGraphTraitsT >, llvm::FunctionTargetTransformInfo, llvm::InstCombiner, llvm::IntervalPartition, llvm::LazyValueInfo, llvm::LibCallAliasAnalysis, llvm::LoopInfo, llvm::LPPassManager, llvm::MemoryDependenceAnalysis, llvm::NVPTXAllocaHoisting, llvm::NVPTXLowerAggrCopies, llvm::PostDominatorTree, llvm::RegionInfoPass, llvm::RGPassManager, llvm::ScalarEvolution, llvm::StackProtector, and llvm::UnifyFunctionExitNodes.
